name: NightFood Holdings, Inc.
business: Nightfood Holdings, Inc. dba TechForce Robotics operates through three wholly owned subsidiaries: TechForce Robotics (AI-powered robotic systems under Robots-as-a-Service), Future Hospitality (plug-and-play robotics for hospitality), and SWC Group (custom-printed foodservice packaging). The company sells AI-powered robotic systems for tasks such as food delivery, bussing, cleaning, and back-of-house operations, as well as disposable foodservice packaging products to hospitality and foodservice operators.

exposures.sentence: Through TechForce Robotics, Inc., we deploy AI-powered robotic systems and automation services that handle repetitive, labor-intensive tasks such as food delivery, bussing, cleaning, and back-of-house operations.

TechForce Robotics offers a suite of robotics and automation solutions under the Robots-as-a-Service (RaaS) model, designed to address repetitive, labor-intensive, and injury-prone tasks that are increasingly difficult for staff to manage.
